# Mycro

> Mycro builds practical tools and guides for small gourmet and functional mushroom farms —
> the growers who sell oyster, lion's mane, shiitake and similar culinary/medicinal mushrooms
> to restaurants, markets and CSAs. Free calculators and reference guides, plus grow-operations
> software (in early access) for tracking batches from spawn to flush.

## Free tools
- [Grow Log (batch tracker)](https://usemycro.com/grow-log.html): a free, no-sign-up mushroom grow log — add each batch, advance it through inoculation, colonization, fruiting and harvest, and get biological efficiency, days-in-stage, an overdue-colonization flag, and contamination rate computed automatically. Saves in the browser; exports CSV/JSON. This is the free, single-device taste of Mycro's grow-operations app.
- [Grow Calculator](https://usemycro.com/calculator.html): estimate substrate, spawn, expected yield (via biological efficiency), and cost/profit per block for any batch and species.
- [Substrate Recipe Calculator](https://usemycro.com/substrate-calculator.html): scale a Masters Mix, supplemented-sawdust, soy-hull, or straw recipe to any number of blocks — exact sawdust, soy hull, bran, gypsum, and water to field capacity.
- [Fruiting Conditions cheat-sheet](https://usemycro.com/fruiting-conditions.html): temperature, humidity, CO2, fresh-air, and light targets for 14 gourmet and medicinal species, with °C/°F toggle.

## Guides
- [Oyster mushroom growing: the complete guide](https://usemycro.com/guides/oyster-mushroom-growing.html): the full beginner-to-grower walk-through for Pleurotus (oyster) — choosing a variety, substrate prep, spawning, colonization, fruiting conditions, harvesting flushes, troubleshooting, and expected yield (biological efficiency); links every calculator and deeper guide.
- [How to start a mushroom farming business](https://usemycro.com/guides/start-mushroom-business.html): realistic, numbers-first guide to going commercial — startup costs, the production cycle, profitability math (biological efficiency × yield × price), finding buyers (markets, restaurants, CSAs), and the mistakes that sink new farms.
- [Biological efficiency, explained](https://usemycro.com/guides/biological-efficiency.html): the BE formula, a worked example, target BE by species, and seven ways to improve it.
- [Spawn ratio, explained](https://usemycro.com/guides/spawn-ratio.html): how much grain spawn to use (10% vs 20% vs 30%+) and the trade-offs for speed, contamination, and yield.
- [How much water to add (field capacity)](https://usemycro.com/guides/field-capacity.html): what field capacity means, the squeeze test, water per substrate type, and how to fix a batch that's too wet or too dry.
- [Contamination: identify & prevent](https://usemycro.com/guides/contamination.html): how to identify green mold (Trichoderma), cobweb, black mold, and bacterial blotch / wet spot, why each happens, and the prevention checklist.
- [All guides](https://usemycro.com/guides/)

## Comparisons
- [Mycro vs MycoHub (MycoHub alternative)](https://usemycro.com/alternatives/mycohub.html): an honest comparison for small commercial gourmet/functional farms. MycoHub is a strong offline-first mobile app for hobby/home growers (private, no account, $9.99 lifetime option); Mycro is web-based grow-ops you open in any browser — a free, no-install Grow Log with automatic biological efficiency and contamination rate, on an open-source engine, built for the commercial selling operation. Includes a side-by-side capability table and who-should-pick-which.

## Open source
- [mycro-grow on GitHub](https://github.com/SaschaHeyer/mycro-grow): the open-source (MIT) engine behind Mycro's calculators — hydration, spawn ratio, biological-efficiency yield, batch economics, substrate recipes, and fruiting-condition data for 14 species, as a zero-dependency JavaScript library + CLI.

## About
- Mycro is for legal culinary and functional/medicinal mushroom cultivation only.
- Early access (the batch-tracking app) is open via the waitlist at https://usemycro.com/#waitlist
